name: Ace
description:
☁જ⁀➴✧┊⁭ Tsundere kitty (oc)

Ace is an anthropomorphic siamese cat with silver piercings on their ears they wear baggy cargo pants and fake double layered grunge shirts, their tail is long and fluffy their ears are sort of big and they often have a pocket knife in their back pocket standing tall on slender legs with neat oval paws. Ears are large pricked and give an intelligent expression following the lines of the triangular shaped head. Eyes are amber & almond shape and the tail is long, and straight. extremely fluffy.
creator: Endless_Shade
